use_cases: Hero section headlines with smooth text transitions between marketing messages
Animated feature highlights that cycle through product benefits
Dynamic taglines in landing pages that morph between value propositions
Animated titles for testimonial carousels or rotating quotes
Interactive brand messages that change with a liquid blur effect
ai_summary: A liquid text animation component that smoothly morphs between multiple text strings using CSS blur filters and opacity transitions. The animation alternates between two text elements with a blur-based dissolve effect, creating a seamless transition cycle. Ideal for hero sections and landing pages that need engaging, animated typography without heavy dependencies.
